hero.eyebrow: Iraq's First Officially Registered IV Therapy Brand
hero.title: The company behind
hero.subtitle: Official Iraqi medical wellness company. International standards. Serving patients, clinics, medical centres, and physicians nationwide — powered by Liquivida®.

trust.credentialsLead: Every detail — from consultation to infusion — is designed for safety, discretion, and results.

about.title: Iraq's IV therapy authority — powered by Liquivida®.
about.body1: Invita is Iraq's first officially registered IV therapy brand. We manufacture and distribute premium clinical IV formulas under international pharmaceutical standards — for patients and for the clinics, hospitals, and physicians who trust us nationwide.
about.body2: We are not a beauty spa, vitamin bar, or influencer brand. We are a serious healthcare company — clinical education, administration protocols, regulatory compliance, and reliable supply included.
about.callout: Official Liquivida® partner · American IV Association verified · Serving Iraq's healthcare network.

transformation.title: From consultation to clarity
transformation.lead: Three quiet moments that define the Invita experience.
transformation.step1Body: Step into a calm private suite. Refreshments. No waiting room chaos.
transformation.step2Body: A 15-minute medical assessment shapes your protocol — never one-size-fits-all.
transformation.step3Body: Feel energy, clarity, and radiance — often within the same afternoon.
